title: [RSO_Call for Proposals_April 25, 2025] WHU-DKU Joint Program – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
[RSO_Call for Proposals_April 25, 2025] WHU-DKU Joint Program
Wuhan University (WHU) and Duke Kunshan University (DKU) are calling for proposals for 2025 WHU-DKU Joint Program (for Academic Year 25/26). Please find attached CFP in this email for details.
Budget Total:
The funding support from the DKU side is up to 50,000 RMB per project. Sponsored by DKU Foundation Hou Tu Research Fund (HTR Fund).
What to fund:
Art History, Philosophy, Anthropology, Archaeology, Global Health, Sustainable Development, and Environmental Science
Project Period: The research project duration for this project will be 18 months (extension is not allowed) from June 8, 2025 – December 7, 2026.
Project Requirements:
Each project must involve one faculty member from DKU as the PI and one faculty member from WHU as the co-PI.
It is encouraged to involve additional faculty members from DKU and/or WHU to join the project as co-PIs.
Upon project completion, a final report must be submitted as the closing documentation and acceptance deliverable for project closure.
The funding must be spent at DKU only and cannot be transferred to other entities including WHU. Sub-contracts between DKU and third parties are not allowed.
All proposals are encouraged to involve DKU undergraduate students in their proposed work.
Eligibility:
Any regular faculty member with a full-time or primary appointment at DKU is eligible to apply for this grant.
Each faculty member can only submit one proposal as the PI, co-PI or other participants each year.
Each faculty member can only have one on-going project funded by the HTR fund.
PIs with ongoing projects under the WHU Seeding Fund are not eligible to apply to this CFP.
All proposals will be submitted separately to WHU and DKU, and undergo independent reviews conducted by each institution.
If you do not have a collaborator from WHU yet and would like to find one candidate, please contact Xiaoshu Li at xiaoshu.li@dukekunshan.edu.cn with the subject line of “Candidate Request for WHU-DKU Joint Funding”.
Application Process:
Please use the attached template to prepare your proposal in English.
Please compile your full proposal and all supporting documents as a SINGLE PDF file and email the PDF document to research-support@dukekunshan.edu.cn with the subject line of “Proposal for WHU-DKU Joint Project Funding”.
Language: English for DKU applicants.
Internal Deadline: 12:00 pm, Monday, May 26, 2025
If you are interested in applying for this funding opportunity, please submit your proposals to RSO by the internal deadline. Shall you encounter any difficulties or have any questions regarding the application process (including the requirements, completing forms, or clarifying any details), please feel free to reach out to Research Support Office Duke Kunshan research-support@dukekunshan.edu.cn.
See attachment 1
See attachment 2
